# Changelog — Product Context

## Purpose

Changelog is the communication layer of the product.

It tells users what has been delivered.

---

## Core concept

Changelog = what has shipped

It is:

- customer-facing
- clear
- concise
- easy to scan

---

## Content

Each entry should include:

- title
- description
- date
- optional linked Request or Initiative

---

## UX expectations

Changelog should feel:

- simple
- clean
- readable
- polished

It should NOT feel like:

- a technical log
- a database view
- an internal admin screen

---

## What users should do here

Users should:

- quickly understand what changed
- see recent updates
- connect updates to product value

---

## Rules

- Keep entries short and meaningful
- Avoid technical jargon
- Focus on value delivered
